name: All Sports Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Decorate your kid's space in sporty style with the All Sports Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This blue throw pillow features a collegiate-style logo with a variety of balls and contrasting red trim along the edges to elevate the look. Made of 100% cotton fabric with 100% polyester filling, this lumbar throw pillow is finished off with a sewn-seam closure for a neat look.
